behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: The failure boundary is between diff-parsing/scoping logic and review-input construction. A unit test of only the scoping helper can miss wiring errors where full file content is accidentally passed downstream.
behaviors.test_description: Run the review-input builder against a synthetic PR diff plus full file contents in a local test harness, then assert the payload sent to the reviewer contains only changed hunks and excludes unchanged regions.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: GitHub diff-position semantics are external and easy to mis-handle. Mocked APIs can accept incorrect positions that real PR review APIs reject or place incorrectly.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR on GitHub, post inline comments using the automation’s computed positions, then fetch PR review comments and verify each comment is anchored to the intended file and changed line in the diff.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on model judgment quality, not just deterministic wiring. A mock/model stub would hide true detection failure.
behaviors.test_description: Use a real PR fixture containing a seeded bug and run the real model-based reviewer multiple times with fixed prompt scaffolding; assert at least one run produces a valid finding that correctly points to the seeded defect.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to an inline comment that was also posted — no findings appear in the summary without a matching inline comment.
behaviors.justification: This is a cross-module consistency check between finding collection, inline-post results, and summary rendering. It does not inherently require real network or model variability if findings are injected deterministically.
behaviors.test_description: In a local integration test, execute the pipeline with a fake PR and deterministic findings, capture posted inline-comment records and generated summary body, and assert every summary finding has a matching inline comment id/location.

behaviors.description: The full sequence — reading the diff, posting inline comments, posting the summary comment — completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: This validates the end-to-end agent pipeline with real PR I/O plus model-driven review output and dependent sequential actions. Failures emerge from step-to-step handoff across the full flow.
behaviors.test_description: Run the automation unattended on a real sandbox PR from start to finish using real GitHub and model calls; verify it reads changed diffs, posts inline comments, and then posts one final summary reflecting posted findings.
